================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 60 49 B9 C4 08
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[EPS P60 ACU GET TABLE HK]

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 96 105 95 95 101 99
v_in[0..5]: 11893 11945 11945 11932 11960 11999

[Bus/Temp]
vbat: 16285
vcc : 3275
temp[0..2]: 232 233 235

[MPPT]
mppt_mode: 1
vboost[0..5]: 11774 11774 11774 11774 11801 11774
power[0..5]: 1141 1242 1113 1157 1198 1187

[DAC]
dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1
dac_val[0..5]: 441 441 441 441 441 440

[Boot/Time]
bootcause : 0
bootcnt   : 256
uptime    : 145
resetcause: 0xEAE3

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 5
mppt_period: 1

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1
device_status[0..7]: 1 3 3 3 4 0 1 1

[WDT]
wdt_cnt_gnd : 65793
wdt_gnd_left: 6
